summary: Tested Admin Console bulk role/subscription changes feature. All features working correctly - checkboxes, select all, bulk actions bar, bulk Change Role dropdown, bulk Change Plan dropdown, and individual dropdowns still functional.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users for backend API testing, reverted changes after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Console Users tab has working bulk selection with checkboxes, Select All, bulk actions bar (cyan/purple gradient), Change Role dropdown (15 roles), Change Plan dropdown (Free/Basic/Premium). Individual role/subscription dropdowns still work.

details: Each user row has a checkbox (button with w-5 h-5 rounded border-2 styling)
Selected checkboxes show cyan background with checkmark icon
Selected user cards have cyan ring/border highlight
Select all (50 users) checkbox visible at top of user list
Text updates to show 'Deselect all' when all selected
Shows count: 'X users selected' with checkmark icon
Contains Change Role button, Change Plan button, and X (clear) button
Sticky positioning at top of user list
Opens dropdown with all 15 role options
Roles: Grom, Surfer, Comp Surfer, Pro, Grom Parent, Hobbyist, Photographer, Approved Pro, School, Coach, Resort, Wave Pool, Shop, Shaper, Destination
Dropdown has dark background (bg-zinc-800) with white text
Premium option styled in yellow/gold color
Accepts user_ids array, optional role and subscription_tier
Validates: non-empty user_ids, at least one update field
Logs admin actions for each user updated
Opens dropdown with all role options
